scripts.ci: bun run fix && bun run --parallel typecheck test knip && bun run build
scripts.clean: rm -rf bun.lock node_modules apps/*/node_modules packages/*/node_modules apps/*/.next packages/*/storybook-static dist coverage *.tsbuildinfo apps/*/.reg packages/*/.reg apps/*/allure-results apps/*/playwright-report apps/*/test-results blob-report .oxc_cache **/__vis__/__diff_output__ **/__vis__/**/__diffs__ **/__vis__/**/__results__ **/__vis__/local .playwright-mcp
scripts.clean:build: bun run clean:install && bun run ci
scripts.deps:update: bun update --latest && bun run --filter '*' deps:update && bun run clean:build
